name: ZyG
description: AI-powered operating system for direct-to-consumer brands enabling automation and optimization
description_en: AI-powered operating system for direct-to-consumer brands enabling automation and optimization
why_matters: $58M seed round led by Bessemer Venture Partners, Viola Ventures, and Lightspeed—exceptional for seed stage; first AI-native OS targeting D2C brands represents category innovation in e-commerce automation
why_matters_en: $58M seed round led by Bessemer Venture Partners, Viola Ventures, and Lightspeed—exceptional for seed stage; first AI-native OS targeting D2C brands represents category innovation in e-commerce automation

name: Isembard
description: AI-powered distributed manufacturing platform using proprietary MasonOS software to enable precision parts production across decentralized factories for aerospace, defense, and critical industries.
description_en: AI-powered distributed manufacturing platform using proprietary MasonOS software to enable precision parts production across decentralized factories for aerospace, defense, and critical industries.
why_matters: Raised $50M in March 2026 to develop 25 AI factories by year-end, led by Union Square Ventures. Founded in 2024, achieved $9M seed round in April 2025 with 5.5x growth in under one year. First vertically-integrated AI manufacturing network addressing critical supply chain resilience. Claims 90% reduction in manufacturing time and 50% cost reduction versus traditional suppliers. Backed by UK National Security Strategic Investment Fund and German Federal Government.
why_matters_en: Raised $50M in March 2026 to develop 25 AI factories by year-end, led by Union Square Ventures. Founded in 2024, achieved $9M seed round in April 2025 with 5.5x growth in under one year. First vertically-integrated AI manufacturing network addressing critical supply chain resilience. Claims 90% reduction in manufacturing time and 50% cost reduction versus traditional suppliers. Backed by UK National Security Strategic Investment Fund and German Federal Government.
latest_news: 2026-03: Secured $50M funding round led by Union Square Ventures to develop 25 new AI factories serving defence, robotics and aerospace industries
latest_news_en: 2026-03: Secured $50M funding round led by Union Square Ventures to develop 25 new AI factories serving defence, robotics and aerospace industries
